strengths: Production ELT pipelines with Airflow and dbt
weaknesses: Limited explicit ML/DL model development experience
No evidence of NLP/Computer Vision work
Limited cloud diversity (GCP-focused vs multi-cloud depth)
improvement_bullets: Engineered predictive datasets through advanced feature engineering and data preprocessing, preparing raw metrics for supervised machine learning model training and inference.
Integrated ML model predictions into production environments by deploying RESTful APIs and microservices, ensuring reliable inference for downstream applications.
Applied foundational knowledge of Scikit-learn and Deep Learning frameworks (TensorFlow/PyTorch) to develop and tune prototype models for pattern recognition and predictive analytics.
Implemented MLOps best practices by monitoring data quality and model performance drift, ensuring system scalability and reliable output for AI-driven decision-making.
Collaborated on exploratory NLP and Computer Vision use cases, utilizing Python libraries to extract insights from unstructured text and image datasets.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer with AI/ML opportunity with Jobs via Dice. I am interested in this opportunity because of the unique challenge of bridging the gap between robust data engineering pipelines and scalable AI model deployment. What interests me about working for Jobs via Dice is your focus on providing data-driven solutions for complex client needs, which resonates with my background in building production-grade data infrastructure. I believe my expertise in Python-based ELT pipelines and my proficiency in Power BI dashboarding would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on automation and scalability. In fact, while building the FRED Economic Batch Pipeline, I architected a production-grade ELT system using Airflow, dbt, and BigQuery to ingest and model complex financial data. This resulted in a significant reduction in analyst query time and provided a clean, structured dataset ready for advanced predictive modeling. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer with AI/ML role would allow me to bring my deep experience in data architecture to support your AI/ML initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my skills in building REST APIs and microservices. I collaborated with engineers to extract data from various sources, driving a 15% increase in feature adoption by ensuring the underlying data was clean and accessible for front-end consumption. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in model integration and pipeline optimization in working on AI/ML deployments at Jobs via Dice. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to data quality align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
